text:
Therefore the native cannot enjoy
success in any business line. But Jupiter is also in the East, thus
indicating that the native can do some independent business, but
it not would beneficial to him.

Mercury and Dragon Tail, both are in the east sign and they are
inimical to each other-Saturn and Mars are in the South-both are

FUNDAMENTAL OF RAO'S SYSTEM OF NADI ASTROLOGY 83
inimical. In the sign to Mars, there is Anti-clockwise Dragon-Head
in the West. Therefore the native's head line is broken (i.e. Line
ofMars) and 7th to mars there is Moon and on the other side
Mars and Saturn are in the South. (are inimical) and they are in
between Mercury and Dragon Tail.
Hence the native's mariage can take place only after 35/36 years
of his age.
